sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Float64, random_val Float64 DEFAULT randUniform(1, 100));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 3.14), (2, NULL), (3, 42.0);
SELECT id, value, random_val, (value < 0 ? randUniform(1,5) : randUniform(10,20)) AS conditional_random FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE secondary_table (id UInt32, ref_id UInt32, score Float64);
INSERT INTO secondary_table (id, ref_id, score) VALUES (1, 1, 7.5), (2, 1, NULL), (3, 2, 8.3);

SELECT st.id, st.score, tt.value, (tt.value IS NULL ? randUniform(0, 1) : tt.value) AS adjusted_value FROM test_table tt JOIN secondary_table st ON tt.id = st.ref_id WHERE (st.score ? tt.value : 0) > randUniform(5, 10);
SELECT st.ref_id, COUNT(*) AS count_non_null, SUM(st.score) AS total_score FROM secondary_table st GROUP BY st.ref_id HAVING total_score > randUniform(5, 15);
SELECT id, (randUniform(-100, 100) ? value : NULL) AS maybe_null_value FROM test_table ORDER BY maybe_null_value;
CREATE TABLE temp_table (id UInt32, flags UInt8);
SELECT tt.id, (randUniform(1, 10) ? 1 : 0) AS dummies, (flags ? (value * 2) : NULL) AS doubled_value FROM test_table tt JOIN temp_table ttt ON tt.id = ttt.id WHERE ttt.flags ? value < 5.0;
SELECT (randUniform(0, 1) ? (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table) : NULL) AS max_value FROM numbers(1);
